vllm.title: Fix `vllm:prompt_tokens_total` metric calculation
vllm.author: ronensc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I have identified an issue with the vllm:prompt_tokens_total counter metric when there are multiple prompts in a batch with different token lengths.
The root cause of the problem lies in the metric counting the token length of the longest prompt in the batch multiplied by the number of prompts in th
